goal: Create setup.py that builds platform-specific aarch64 wheels via --chip parameter, auto-compiles pybind11 extension with CMake, supports --bsp-dir override, and produces correctly tagged wheels

requirement_alignment.target: aarch64 platforms: ax650, ax630c, ax620q, ax8850
requirement_alignment.build_scope: Full build: find libax_asr_api.a + BSP libs -> CMake compile -> package wheel
requirement_alignment.bsp_paths: Default relative paths per chip, --bsp-dir override
requirement_alignment.python_version: Build for current Python version, cp-specific ABI tag

issues.title: feat[1]: setup.py with --chip platform selection for aarch64 wheel builds
acceptance_checks: python setup.py bdist_wheel --chip=ax650 builds wheel with +ax650 label
python setup.py bdist_wheel --chip=ax630c builds wheel with +ax630c label
python setup.py bdist_wheel --chip=ax8850 --bsp-dir=/custom/path overrides default BSP dir
Wheel uses cp-specific Python version tag

rounds.summary: Rewrote setup.py with ChipBdistWheel command supporting --chip/--bsp-dir

assumptions: BSP SDK available at relative paths (download_bsp.sh run first)
